title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Oberoi Realty - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Oberoi Realty - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Oberoi Realty has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Rajkot office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Oberoi Realty:
Oberoi Realty is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
